iot.securityprofile.alerttarget.CfnAbout: A structure containing the alert target ARN and the role ARN.

iot.securityprofile.alerttarget.AlertTar.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the notification target to which alerts are sent.

iot.securityprofile.alerttarget.RoleArn.Description: The ARN of the role that grants permission to send alerts to the notification target.
